title: Bignay
description: A lightweight mod that adds missing blocks and items to improve your Minecraft experience.
body:
# About
**Bignay** is a simple quality-of-life mod that adds small but useful features and building options which feel like they should already exist in Minecraft.

Requires [Fabic API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) for Fabric version.

## Features:
- Screenshots Viewer
- Basalt, Calcite and Dripstone variants
- More Campfires, Mosaics and Bookshelves
- Vertical Slabs
- Pumpkins variants
- Cracked Brick Variants
- Hollow Logs
- Andesite, Granite and Diorite Variants
- More mob heads
- Heavy chains
- Quad item frames
- Huge mushroom generation in swamps
- More plants
- Mossy stone blocks
- New Options for worlds: Importing, Exporting, Pruning and World Info
- A new Verdant Nether wood set (similar to Crimson and Warped, but green)

### Credits:
Not all textures were made by me, see [Credits.md](https://github.com/MysiuPysiu76/Bignay/blob/main/CREDITS.md) for more information, inspired by Quark.
